# solo

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Solo (fullscreen) surface mode — only the focused tab, full-viewport, with a hover exit button and an Esc shortcut back to the previous mode.
- Web:
  - Contributes:
    - `Surface.Placement`
    - `Shortcuts.Shortcut` "surface.exit-solo (Escape)"
  - Uses:
    - `apps-core/surface.Surface`
    - `apps-core/tabs.exitToPreviousMode`
    - `apps-core/tabs.getSurfaceMode`
    - `primitives/css/pin.Pin`
    - `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`
    - `primitives/shortcuts.defineShortcut`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
